nasb.text: The commander took him by the hand and stepping aside, began to inquire of him privately, “What is it that you have to report to me?”

esv.text: The tribune took him by the hand, and going aside asked him privately, “What is it that you have to tell me?”

cnv.text: 千夫長拉著他的手，走到一邊，私下問他：“你有甚麼事要向我報告？”

ccb.text: 千夫长就拉着那青年的手走到一旁，私下问他：“你有什么事要告诉我？”

csbs.text: 千夫长拉着年轻人的手，退到一边，悄悄地问他：“你有什么事要告诉我？”
